title: Trump: Iran is losing $500 million daily due to Hormuz blockade
snippet: Trump: 'THE BLOCKADE, which we will not take off until there is a DEAL, is absolutely destroying Iran. They are losing $500 Million Dollars a day, an unsustainable number, even in the short run.' Trump claims Iran collapsing financially.
tag_reason: $500M/일 손실 주장과 'absolutely destroying Iran' 발언은 금일 신규 내용.
